lint.note: go vet ./server/... has pre-existing warnings in server/stream.go (MarshalJSON signature mismatch) not introduced by this milestone

appliedUpdates.description: Added server-v2-config architecture notes documenting configV2Wrapper pattern and pre-existing go vet warning in architecture.md

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update go-library-worker SKILL.md Step 3 (TDD) to add carve-outs: (a) For server/ features where types must be defined before tests compile, writing implementation first then tests is acceptable. (b) For purely additive metadata changes (struct tags) with no behavior change, existing tests are sufficient.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 3 features deviated from TDD mandate. server-opts-conf-tags: purely additive struct tags with no behavior to test-first. server-custom-unmarshalers: types must exist before test compilation. server-process-config-v2: same pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update go-library-worker SKILL.md Step 4 to replace 'Never modify files outside conf/v2/' with 'For conf/v2/ milestone features, only modify files in conf/v2/. For server-v2-config milestone features, new files may be created in server/ as specified by the feature description.' This aligns with AGENTS.md which already allows server/ modifications.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: server-custom-unmarshalers and server-process-config-v2 both required creating new files in server/ (opts_unmarshal.go, opts_v2.go, opts_v2_test.go, opts_unmarshal_test.go). The skill's blanket rule contradicts AGENTS.md and the feature descriptions.

rejectedObservations.observation: RemoteLeafOpts.Websocket anonymous struct pattern creates confusing inner tags under conf:"-" outer struct
rejectedObservations.reason: Implementation-specific detail already captured in server-opts-conf-tags review as a non-blocking issue. Not a systemic pattern requiring guidance changes — it's a one-off design choice specific to the Websocket sub-struct.
